title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF KAPITAN RAMON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KAPITAN RAMON, CITY OF SILAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL TO DON FELIX T. LACSON MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 3561; 105 OG No. 32, 4851 (August 10, 2009)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9641, May 29, 2009 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF KAPITAN RAMON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KAPITAN RAMON, CITY OF SILAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL TO DON FELIX T. LACSON MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Kapitan Ramon National High School in Barangay Kapitan Ramon, City of Silay, Province of Negros Occidental is hereby changed to Don Felix T. Lacson Memorial National High School.

SEC. 2.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 10, 2008 and January 21, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 29 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
